title: NP
description: No-fee nonprofit membership for qualifying organizations.
benefits: Basic listing in the chamber directory
Access to chamber newsletter and announcements

title: Bronze
description: Entry-level business membership at $250 per year.
benefits: Member pricing for one annual training workshop
Enhanced directory listing with business logo

title: Silver
description: Growth membership at $500 per year with stronger visibility.
benefits: Quarterly spotlight post on chamber social channels
Priority placement in the online member directory

title: Gold
description: Premium membership at $1000 per year with maximum exposure.
benefits: VIP access to special events and executive networking receptions
Featured placement in chamber newsletter and directory
